CD20: non-internalizing type-I marker (class rationale: CD20 does not modulate/internalize on binding)
CD19: stable B-lineage marker, slow internalization (class rationale)
BCMA: rapid internalization of surface BCMA + newly-expressed protein by 1h, undetectable by 24h, protein-synthesis-dependent re-expression; Lee et al 2016 Br J Haematol 174:911-922 (PMID 27313079, web-verified this session)
TNFRSF17: = BCMA; Lee 2016 Br J Haematol PMID 27313079 (web-verified this session)
DLL3: internalizing ADC/TCE target (class rationale for Notch-ligand ADC targets)
GPRC5D: internalizing orphan GPCR (class rationale for GPCR internalization)
PD-1: slow internalization, activated-T turnover (class rationale for checkpoint)

VEGFA: free VEGF rapid turnover; project bevacizumab elim 0.401/day
TNF: membrane+soluble TNF; adalimumab validated at this value — keep

provenance_note: kint/kdeg values are antigen-CLASS mechanistic estimates (internalizing vs non-internalizing behavior), NOT sourced from molecule-specific measurements except where marked '(verified)': BCMA (Lee 2016 (Br J Haematol, PMID 27313079) PMID27313079) and EGFR (Lobet 2023).
